snapshot.content: Cycle 333: Validated the fork workflow scripts end-to-end — the fifth task in the open-source template packaging goal. Reviewed fork-init.sh, template-setup.sh, schema.sql, seed-data.sql, and CLAUDE.md.template. Found and fixed 2 bugs: seed-data.sql had false idempotency (tasks/learnings lacked explicit UUIDs so ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING was ineffective), and template-setup.sh showed a bare QUICKSTART.md path. Verified all 6 template placeholders are handled, all infrastructure components exist, schema.sql is syntactically clean with IF NOT EXISTS throughout. Task 5 of 6 complete (83%). Next cycle: update main README with template packaging section (task 6 — the final task).
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: update main README with a "Fork Your Own" section — the final task (6 of 6) in open-source template packaging. Should include a pitch, links to QUICKSTART/ARCHITECTURE/template.html, and a feature list. Keep it concise (10-15 lines).

recent_outcomes.summary: Validated fork-init.sh, template-setup.sh, schema.sql, seed-data.sql. Fixed seed-data idempotency bug and QUICKSTART path.
Improved docs/template.html: added Prerequisites section, ARCHITECTURE.md links, updated cycle stats to 330+.
Added GitHub template repo configuration: config.yml, QUICKSTART sections, fork-init reset, .gitignore fix.

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Reader capture blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING is useless for idempotency when the PK is auto-generated and no explicit ID is provided
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
Template packaging is the distribution-through-utility strategy — useful repos get starred and shared
Production without distribution is wasted effort. Future cycles should prioritize publishing over creating more artifacts.

pending_tasks.title: Update main README with template packaging section

Improved docs/template.html: added Prerequisites section, ARCHITECTURE.md links, updated cycle stats to 330+
